counters.description: nobody plays him in low elo and if they do they mostly suck, in mid-high elo he's your main ban. why? he breaks shields which is your main gimmick here and aside from that he outdps and outsustains you.

unplayable matchup all across the board, she counters all dashing champs, thank god nobody plays her like at all. why? hard counter to all dashing champs while being super chonky with ridiculous dps, your only chances are during lvl1 fight.

very hard matchup but still managable if you can abuse his passive timers, he has boost to defense when his passive shield is up and it takes few seconds before it's up again but it's all pointless once you reach mid-late where he's just unkillable for you.
very passive lane, all-in after you manage to bait out his w, it has a long ass cooldown, if you don't fall too behind he should be managable since your build is crit oriented.

bait out his jump and e it then he has no way to stun you with his counter cause you can easly get out of it's range with q, quiet hard to manage cause his ult will always win him the 1v1 so watch out for that.
ugly ass crab, it's the matter of who uses their dash first, if he has actual hands and isn't a complete bot it's very hard to manage.
avoid her e at all cost, don't jump into her ult, she will always outdps you once she builds iceborn.
avoid at all cost during teamfights, her q breaks shields, atleast wait out her q before going in.

hard to manage if he places lightning right, you need to turn off your music that you probably play on another tab cause you gotta listen to his ability sounds, try going in after he wastes lightning.
you will feed really hard if he plays correctly, you can go even if played safe, anticipate his skillshot and avoid with e, he will try to chip you down when wave gets under your tower.

yeah vision will be very important here, avoid 1v1 at all cost, he will most likely focus you and won't let you breath so don't get baited by enemy laner into going too far without any info about his location.
yeah this one's kinda hard, let your jg be the bait so he gets locked-on instead, heimer on his own is kinda weak, turrets are really busted tho
really hard to take down, he outdps and outheals you
watch out for her root, use your dashes to get out of her r
if he's going ap he can proc your shieldbow quiet easly late game, remember to carry sweeper and buy control wards

synergies.description: if he has nightbringer skin always pick dawnbringer to match, bonus morale in the team for that
pretty much any tank with lots of stuns, preferably one with ranged skills or one that can just catch up to you
thanks to your q3[icon:broken wings] you can wallhop into his r
your stuns can keep her enemies inside her r
more shields and sustain is always welcome, kitty cat can be quiet usefull late game if you manage to carry
keeping enemy in place will help draven focus more on his falling axes
his upgrades will cover your lack of haste in build
thanks to her root you won't need to waste your e[icon:valor] to close gap into the enemy
your cc is always welcome whenever her passive is channeling, just like with mf your stuns help her keep enemies in the aoe of r
samira likes champions with knockups
he lets you go a little more crazy thanks to his revive
riven is a strong laner and it will help shyvana focus on her farm, she is a scaling jungler that has to full clear, be patient with her and she will be ustoppable late game.
your q3[icon:broken wings] slightly pushes enemy depending on where you land, thanks to this you can push enemies into veigar's cage and stun them.
thanks to huge number of shields that you carry you will always win whenever her ult ends (make sure to save e)
zed is all about positioning and using his shadows to deal damage so keeping enemy in place will help him a ton
if he has nightbringer skin always pick dawnbringer to match, bonus morale in the team for that
